sheet.text: Details Inspector Close Decision Metrics Boundary Evidence Selected replay window LEO review focus State 1 of 5 Replay UTC 2026-04-28T08:59:00.644Z Sim replay 00:07 / 01:54 Source provenance Evidence for the selected replay window. The scene narrative and sequence rail remain primary. Decision · State Evidence 剛接上 OneWeb LEO · LEO review focus 剛接上 OneWeb LEO，連線品質強。約 22 分鐘後，因為位置條件變化會進入訊號減弱階段。 NowNow: LEO is the modeled primary service state for this window. WhyWhy: position conditions support low-latency LEO review focus. NextNext: watch for LEO aging pressure before the MEO hold window. WatchWatch: simulated service time and modeled quality class only. The simulation review is currently anchored on the OneWeb LEO context marked as the focus role. The five-state V4.6D model is in window 1 of 5. Watch the LEO actor for the early pressure signal — the next modeled state is LEO pressure. Endpoint precision remains operator-family only and no active gateway is being claimed. Metrics Modeled classes Modeled link quality: strong LEO class from V4.6D projection. Communication time: approximate simulated remaining window time. Unavailable measured data Unavailable measured data: no ping, iperf, ESTNeT/INET, DUT, latency, jitter, throughput, or packet-loss feed is connected to this route. Unavailable physical factors: rain, antenna, ITU/V group, and rain attenuation models are not connected in this scene. Boundary · Truth Boundary Truth boundary Simulation boundary: 13-actor demo, repo-owned projection, not measured truth. Service-layer boundary: modeled service handover, not native RF handover. Endpoint boundary: operator-family precision, not site-level gateway claim. Scale boundary: not >=500 LEO validation and not 24h hardware-GPU closeout. simulation outputoperator-family precisiondisplay-context actors Simulated display-context state, not an operator handover log.Source-lineaged display-context actors, not active serving satellites.Endpoint precision stays operator-family only.No active gateway assignment is claimed.No pair-specific teleport path is claimed.No measured latency, jitter, throughput, or continuity values are shown.No native RF handover is claimed. Evidence Source provenance All repo-owned projection sources. TLE source summary: CelesTrak NORAD GP records are retained through the repo-owned projection. Endpoint evidence: Taiwan / CHT and Singapore / Speedcast are operator-family evidence only. R2 archive: read-only provenance, not a precision mode or runtime selector.
